collection.name: Azusa, Lost but Seeking
collection.description: You may play two additional lands on each of your turns.
collection.flavor_text: "With every step, I discover a new stage. With every breath, a new song."

collection.description: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to each other creature and each opponent.
collection.flavor_text: Sakura Miku's singing strikes like lightning in the spring.
